title: Schedule Spec
description: Specification for a governed recurring schedule that triggers HELM intent execution, including cron or rrule expressions, jitter, and retry policy.

kind.description: Schedule expression format: cron (POSIX cron syntax) or rrule (RFC 5545 RRULE).

expression.description: Schedule expression string matching the declared kind.

timezone.description: IANA timezone name for expression evaluation (e.g. America/New_York, UTC).

catchup_policy.description: Policy for handling missed executions after downtime.

max_concurrency.description: Maximum number of concurrent executions of this schedule.

jitter_window_ms.description: Random jitter window in milliseconds applied to each trigger to spread load.

retry.description: Retry policy applied to failed executions.

max_attempts.description: Maximum number of retry attempts (0 = no retries).

enabled.description: Whether this schedule is currently active.

intent_template_id.description: Reference to the intent template that will be instantiated on each trigger.
